# Inflection validation (inflect-eval)

**Denominator:** every single-word official lemma (noun/adjective/verb), 14625 lemmas → 231977 paradigm cells generated by the bundled `interslavic` crate. Blank cells are inflector panics recovered by `catch_unwind`. (The export's separate blank-cell count also covers machine-generated reconstruction headwords, whose irregular shapes are where those blanks come from — official lemmas inflect cleanly.) Grammar invariants are the citation-form and ending rules RULE_SPEC §3 states; the failure sample below is the genuine inflector worklist (soft -o loans, §3.5 indeclinables the lexicon must mark).

| Measurement | value |
|---|---:|
| blank cells | **0** of 231977 (0.00%) |
| — adj | 0 of 133104 (0.00%) |
| — noun | 0 of 94932 (0.00%) |
| — verb (whole paradigm) | 0 of 3941 (0.00%) |

## Grammar invariants (RULE_SPEC §3)

| invariant | pass | rate |
|---|---:|---:|
| adj nom.sg.f ends -a | 2773/2773 | 100.0% |
| adj nom.sg.m = citation form | 2773/2773 | 100.0% |
| adj nom.sg.n ends -o/-e | 2773/2773 | 100.0% |
| adj table struct path = cell getter | 2773/2773 | 100.0% |
| masc/neut gen.sg ends -a | 3889/3897 | 99.8% |
| noun nom.sg = citation form | 7791/7793 | 100.0% |
| noun table struct path = cell getter | 7911/7911 | 100.0% |
| suppletive plurals (§3.1, from the inflector) | 4/4 | 100.0% |
